summary: To add a rating field to the Quote model, I will first update the Prisma schema and the TypeScript interface for the Quote object. Then, I will update the components that display the quote and handle its data to ensure the new field is properly rendered.

files.reason: This is where the database model for Quote is defined and must be updated to include the rating field.
The TypeScript definition for the Quote type must be updated to include the new rating property.
This component renders the Quote data and will need to be modified to display the new rating field.
If this file contains seed data for quotes, it should be updated to include the rating field for consistency.
The API route responsible for creating quotes may need to be updated to accept or generate a rating.
